subject: Son Gohan (Dragon Ball Super) in Super Saiyan form — anime IP character, powered-up stance
description: A young male figure with spiky golden hair stands in a forward-leaning combat stance, body surrounded by crackling golden ki energy. The hair is unmistakably Super Saiyan — standing upright, golden-colored. His expression is intense and determined. The background is a cool blue-gray with energy halos suggesting a charged atmosphere. The card art is rendered in a clean anime style consistent with the Dragon Ball Super franchise.
foreground: Young male humanoid in Super Saiyan transformation, golden spiky hair, combat stance, ki aura active
background: Cool blue-gray energy field with glowing halos and light diffusion
